title: [Mine Shaft]
description: The shaft comes to an abrupt end as the ceiling begins to slope rapidly downward to meet the floor.  The wall juts sharply underneath itself and you can see the ground reaching far underneath it.

wayto.7328: ;e result = nil;while result.nil? && Room.current.id == 7393;result = dothistimeout "crawl hole",3,/^You crawl under the low overhang/;end;wait_while{stunned?};fput "stand" until standing?
